resume:
REGINA CANDIDATE | SOFTWARE ENGINEER  
Contact: regina.can@email.com  | +66 81 -234-5678 LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/reginacandidate Location: Bangkok, Thailand  
PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY  
Results -oriented Software Engineer with 4+ years of experience in full -stack development. Proven track record in optimizing 
system performance and leading agile teams to deliver high -quality software solutions. Expert in Python, Javascript, and Cloud 
Infrastructure.  
WORK EXPERIENCE  
SENIOR SOFTWARE ENGINEER | Tech Solutions Co., Ltd. Jan 2022 – Present  
Led a team of 5 developers to migrate legacy systems to microservices architecture, improving system uptime by 35%.  
Implemented automated CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins and Docker, reducing deployment time by 50%.  
Optimized database queries in PostgreSQL, resulting in 20% faster load times.  
JUNIOR DEVELOPER | Innovate Apps June 2019 – Dec 2021  
Developed and maintained responsive web applications using React.js and Node.js.  
Collaborated with UX/UI designers to enhance user interface, increasing user engagement by 15%.  
Fixed critical bugs and improved overall code quality through rigorous unit testing.  
TECHNICAL SKILLS  
Languages: Python (Expert), JavaScript (Advanced), SQL, Go  
Frameworks: FastAPI, Django, React, Express.js  
Tools/DevOps: Docker, Kubernetes, AWS, Git, CI/CD  
Soft Skills: Agile Methodology, Team Leadership, Problem Solving  
EDUCATION  
BACHELOR OF COMPUTER ENGINEERING Chulalongkorn University | 2015 – 2019 GPA: 3.85/4.00  
PROJECTS  
AI-Powered Recruitment Tool: Developed a matching engine that ranks resumes against job descriptions using NLP.  
E-commerce Platform: Built a scalable backend for a retail app handling 10k+ daily transactions.  
CERTIFICATIONS  
AWS Certified Solutions Architect – Associate  
Professional Scrum Master (PSM I)  
LANGUAGES  
Thai (Native)  
English (Fluent / TOEIC 900)
